mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.author_id, c.like_count, c.status, c.is_featured, c.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM comment c JOIN "user" u ON c.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.author_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.status, c.is_featured, c.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar AS reply_to_avatar FROM comment c JOIN "user" u ON c.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN "user" ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id AND ru.deleted = 0 WHERE c.status = 0 AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE status = 0 AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, content, author_id, post_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, like_count, status, is_featured, created_at, deleted FROM comment WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND is_featured = true
